strengths: Current role at re:cinq directly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks—a specialized required skill rarely found in candidates
15+ years full-stack experience with Staff-level progression vastly exceeds 6-year minimum requirement
Expert-level TypeScript/Node.js mastery proven in production systems handling millions of concurrent requests

response.justification: Bogdan's current Staff role at re:cinq working on AI-agent infrastructure directly addresses a specialized, rarely-found required skill. His 15+ years with Staff-level progression vastly exceed the 6-year requirement and demonstrate architectural depth. Expert-level TypeScript/Node.js mastery is proven in production systems at scale (millions of concurrent requests). MIT Computer Science degree exceeds formal requirement. While specific tools (Nest.js, Vitest, Kubernetes) aren't mentioned, strong testing fundamentals and architecture suggest rapid capability.
